name: Vaccinia_central_RNA_pol_locus
description: Vaccinia central conserved region encoding the multi-subunit viral RNA polymerase (rpo147 J6R, rpo132 A24R, rpo35 A29L, rpo30 E4L, rpo22 J4R, rpo19 A5R, rpo18 D7R, rpo7 G5.5R) and associated transcription factors (VETF, NPH I/II). This region is the highest-conservation locus across the entire Poxviridae family and is the primary phylogenetic anchor for orthopox/parapox/molluscipox classification. PSV-disambig essential for distinguishing vaccinia from cowpox/monkeypox/variola when typing clinical samples or biothreat surveillance.
